articles.title: 'Avengers: Doomsday' footage, 'Mandalorian' opening unveiled at CinemaCon
articles.summary: The Walt Disney Co. presented a large-scale preview at CinemaCon, showcasing new footage for "Avengers: Doomsday," which features Robert Downey Jr.'s return as Doctor Doom and Chris Evans as Captain America, and the opening sequence of "The Mandalorian and Grogu" film. Additionally, Tom Hanks and Tim Allen promoted "Toy Story 5," and Dwayne Johnson introduced the live-action "Moana" with its new star, Catherine Laga’aia. The presentation highlighted Disney's continued dominance at the box office and its upcoming slate of films, despite recent company layoffs.

articles.title: Walt Disney Studios Wows CinemaCon® Attendees at 2026 Gathering in Las Vegas
articles.summary: Walt Disney Studios showcased its upcoming theatrical releases at CinemaCon 2026, highlighting strong box office performance in 2025 with hits like "Zootopia 2" and "Avatar: Fire and Ash." The presentation featured exclusive looks at films such as "The Devil Wears Prada 2," "Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu," "Toy Story 5," and the live-action "Moana," alongside announcements of new certifications for premium large format screens named Infinity Vision, and culminated with a preview of Marvel's "Avengers: Doomsday."

articles.title: A Look At WEBTOON Entertainment (WBTN) Valuation As New Executive Structure Targets Growth And AI-Driven Expansion
articles.summary: WEBTOON Entertainment (WBTN) has restructured its senior leadership to target growth and AI-driven expansion, leading to a 27.62% share price climb over the past month. Despite recent momentum building from a lower base, the company is still considered 6.2% undervalued, trading about 6% below the average analyst price target with an implied intrinsic discount of around 67%. A multi-year collaboration with Disney is expected to further drive user acquisition and engagement, supporting revenue growth, though slowing user growth and rising costs remain potential risks to its valuation.

articles.title: AE Wealth Management LLC Grows Holdings in The Walt Disney Company $DIS
articles.summary: AE Wealth Management LLC significantly increased its stake in The Walt Disney Company by 26.3% in Q4 2025, now holding shares valued at approximately $28.67 million. This comes as Disney reported an earnings beat and revenue growth, with analysts maintaining a "Moderate Buy" rating. The company is implementing cost-cutting measures and strategic initiatives in parks, studios, and real estate, balancing near-term execution risks with potential long-term revenue upside.

articles.title: The Walt Disney Studios and Global Theatrical Exhibition Partners Launch 'Infinity Vision' — The Ultimate Premium Moviegoing Experience
articles.summary: The Walt Disney Studios announced the launch of "Infinity Vision," a new certification for premium large format (PLF) theaters, in collaboration with global theatrical exhibition partners. This initiative aims to help audiences identify auditoriums offering the biggest, brightest, and most immersive cinematic experiences through rigorous technical standards, including large screens, laser projection, and premium audio. Beginning with the re-release of Marvel Studios’ Avengers: Endgame and the upcoming Avengers: Doomsday, audiences can seek out Infinity Vision-certified screens for an optimal viewing experience.
